headline: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (ISRG): Israel Englander Is Loading Up on This Stock
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is featured on the Israel Englander Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks. Israel Englander has been a long-term admirer of Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) stock. The firm first made an appearance in the 13F portfolio of the fund in the fourth quarter of 2010. This holding comprised around 200,000 shares. After […]

headline: Reaffirmed da Vinci Growth Guidance and New Platforms Could Be A Game Changer For Intuitive Surgical (ISRG)
summary: In recent weeks, Intuitive Surgical has reported better-than-expected quarterly revenue and earnings, reaffirmed double-digit da Vinci procedure growth guidance for 2026, and highlighted ongoing investment in new platforms like the Ion system. This combination of robust procedure outlook, high recurring revenue from instruments and services, and an upcoming April 21, 2026 earnings update is sharpening investor focus on how resilient the company’s leadership in robotic-assisted surgery may be...

headline: Citi Cuts Medtronic (MDT) Target, Stifel Lowers Outlook after MiniMed IPO
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 7, Citi analyst Joanne Wuensch lowered the firm’s price target on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $110 from $117 and kept a Buy rating.
